summary: PR 2587 matched or cleaned up Link Arrow item motion code centered on itLinkarrow_UnkMotion1_Anim, renamed the global function at 0x802A850C from it_802A850C to itLinkArrow_802A850C across symbols, header, and Fighter callsites, and made small local readability/codegen-shaping edits in src/melee/it/items/itlinkarrow.c. The bot report recorded 'No changes'.

key_files.role: Primary item implementation changed: renamed it_802A850C helpers/function, used clearer locals, GET_ITEM/GET_JOBJ accessors, adjusted padding/local stack declarations, and touched itLinkarrow_UnkMotion1_Anim.
Header prototype updated from it_802A850C to itLinkArrow_802A850C.
Symbol name at .text:0x802A850C changed to itLinkArrow_802A850C while preserving size and global scope metadata.
Link special-N callsite updated to the renamed Link Arrow item function.
Kirby Link-copy special-N callsite updated to the renamed Link Arrow item function.

what_changed.text: Renamed global function it_802A850C to itLinkArrow_802A850C in symbols.txt, itlinkarrow.h, itlinkarrow.c, and two fighter callsites.
Renamed local helper inlines tied to the 0x802A850C function from it_802A850C_inline / it_802A850C_inline_2 to itLinkArrow_802A850C_inline / itLinkArrow_802A850C_inline_2.
Improved local variable names in itlinkarrow.c, including var_r30 to jobj and sp60 to flags.
In itLinkarrow_UnkMotion1_Anim-related code, replaced direct gobj field access with GET_ITEM(gobj) and GET_JOBJ(gobj) in touched contexts.
Adjusted stack/padding declarations in itLinkarrow_UnkMotion1_Anim: changed _pad/PAD_STACK(16) pattern to pad[4] plus _pad[4].
decomp-dev bot issue comment for GALE01 reported 'No changes'.

smart_moves.text: The semantic rename was applied consistently across symbol metadata, header prototype, implementation, and known callsites, avoiding split-brain naming for the same 0x802A850C function.
Local names were made more reviewable where roles were evident from types or call signatures, such as HSD_JObj* jobj and u32 flags passed to it_8026EA20.
Header prototype was updated together with the recovered implementation name, matching the truthful-headers pattern from the loaded standards.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When an address-style item function gains a supported subsystem-specific name, update the owning symbol entry, declaration, implementation, and all visible callsites in the same patch.

Accessor macros such as GET_ITEM and GET_JOBJ can be part of matching cleanup when replacing direct gobj->user_data or gobj->hsd_obj access in item code, but the PR evidence only proves this for the touched Link Arrow contexts.
Stack padding and local declaration shape may be adjusted narrowly during a match, but the durable record should preserve that this was a matching tactic, not a broad style rule.

naming_conventions.name: itLinkArrow_802A850C
naming_conventions.text: PR renamed address-style it_802A850C to subsystem-prefixed itLinkArrow_802A850C while retaining the address suffix.

naming_conventions.name: itLinkArrow_802A850C_inline / itLinkArrow_802A850C_inline_2
naming_conventions.text: Helper names were kept tied to the renamed parent function.

naming_conventions.name: jobj
naming_conventions.text: HSD_JObj* local var_r30 was renamed to jobj, matching a clear object role.

naming_conventions.name: flags
naming_conventions.text: Stack local sp60 was renamed to flags where it is passed by address to it_8026EA20.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used accessor macros GET_ITEM and GET_JOBJ in touched item animation code instead of direct gobj fields.
Changed local declaration initialization order in itLinkarrow_UnkMotion1_Anim_inline by combining declaration and initialization for item and jobj.
Adjusted padding/stack locals around itLinkarrow_UnkMotion1_Anim by replacing PAD_STACK(16) with explicit u8 pad[4] and u8 _pad[4].
Bot report says GALE01 had 'No changes'; no inline objdiff or build logs are present in the slice beyond that report.

notes: Changed files and diff are complete for the slice.
PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded evidence.
The only validation-like evidence is a decomp-dev bot issue comment saying 'No changes'; no detailed objdiff, build command, or reviewer rationale is present.
The PR title claims matching itLinkarrow_UnkMotion1_Anim, but the diff also includes a related 0x802A850C rename and callsite/header updates; intent beyond the visible patch is not inferred.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep semantic function renames synchronized across symbols, headers, implementation, and callsites
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2587 shows a Link Arrow item function rename from it_802A850C to itLinkArrow_802A850C applied consistently to config/GALE01/symbols.txt, src/melee/it/items/itlinkarrow.h, src/melee/it/items/itlinkarrow.c, and Link/Kirby callsites.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Treat explicit padding/local-shape changes as narrow matching tactics
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2587 adjusted padding and stack locals in itLinkarrow_UnkMotion1_Anim while the bot report said GALE01 had no changes. This is useful as a narrow example, not as a general style rule.

source_update_candidates.title: Link Arrow 0x802A850C symbol renamed in PR 2587
source_update_candidates.text: In PR 2587, config/GALE01/symbols.txt changed .text:0x802A850C from it_802A850C to itLinkArrow_802A850C with size 0x478 and global scope, and the header/implementation/callsites were updated to the new name.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for symbol/name history; curator should verify against current source before promoting.

rejection_notes: Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale: the slice contains no human review comments.
Do not promote a broad rule that GET_JOBJ should always replace gobj->hsd_obj; the diff only shows this change in one touched helper.
Do not claim a full local build or objdiff run beyond the bot 'No changes' report unless additional evidence is loaded.
Do not treat the stack padding adjustment as accepted general style; loaded standards require verifier evidence for matching tactics.
